description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the microsoft/dotnet:latest Docker image and three stages: test, build, and release. In the test stage add a test:branch job that runs ./build.sh build-debug run-tests and runs on all branches except those matching /master/ or /develop/. In the build stage add a build:develop job that runs ./build.sh build-debug run-tests, only on the develop branch (/develop/), and publishes the compiled binaries at ./src/DrivenDb.Standard/bin/Debug/netstandard2.0/* as artifacts. In the release stage add a release:master job that runs ./build.sh download-semrel download-ezrep build-debug run-tests build-release package-release publish-release tag-release, only on the master branch (/master/).
